mapper.select:
SELECT id, name, image_url, image_keyword, sort_order, is_visible, create_time FROM certification
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO certification (name, image_url, image_keyword, sort_order, is_visible, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{imageUrl}, #{imageKeyword}, #{sortOrder}, #{isVisible}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
